summary: Tested merged home page and mode selector consolidation. All 10 required features verified successfully. Home page now shows SEM and MEA cards side-by-side with inline drop zones immediately - no intermediate mode-select navigation step.
critical_code_review_comments: HomeBrowser.js: Successfully merged mode cards with inline drop zones (lines 705-811)
HomeBrowser.js: SEM card has data-testid='sem-mode-card' with proper title and cardiac activity description
HomeBrowser.js: MEA card has data-testid='mea-mode-card' with proper title and neuronal activity description
HomeBrowser.js: SEM drop zone accepts only .abf files (data-testid='sem-dropzone', input accept='.abf')
HomeBrowser.js: MEA drop zone accepts only .csv files up to 5 (data-testid='mea-dropzone', input accept='.csv' multiple)
HomeBrowser.js: Info tooltips (InfoTooltip component) present on both cards with detailed descriptions (SEM_TOOLTIP, MEA_TOOLTIP)
App.js: Removed mode-select view - ModeSelector.js no longer imported
App.js: MEA upload back navigation correctly goes to 'home' (line 1551: setAppView('home'))
ModeSelector.js: File still exists but is no longer used - could be removed as cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home page and mode selector merged into single view. Key data-testids: sem-mode-card, mea-mode-card, sem-dropzone, mea-dropzone, sem-file-input, mea-file-input, home-browser. ModeSelector.js is now dead code - can be removed.

features_verified.home_page_shows_both_cards_immediately: PASS - No redirect, home-browser renders SEM and MEA cards directly
features_verified.sem_card_cardiac_description: PASS - Description mentions 'cardiac activity - cardioids alone or neuro-cardiac assembloids'
features_verified.mea_card_neuronal_description: PASS - Description mentions 'neuronal activity - neuronal organoids'
features_verified.sem_dropzone_abf_files: PASS - Drop zone accepts only .abf files (input accept='.abf')
features_verified.mea_dropzone_csv_files: PASS - Drop zone accepts only .csv files up to 5 (input accept='.csv' multiple)
features_verified.info_tooltips_present: PASS - Both cards have (i) info tooltip buttons
features_verified.mea_back_navigation_to_home: PASS - App.js line 1551 confirms onBack goes to 'home' not 'mode-select'
features_verified.saved_recordings_visible: PASS - 'SAVED RECORDINGS' section displayed below mode cards
